message:
🐛 Fix Nightly E2E card showing demo data on load and losing cache on refresh (#1181)

- Use localStorage as synchronous cache backup so data survives browser
  refresh (the async SQLite/OPFS cache layer may not hydrate in time)
- Change initialData from demo data to empty so skeleton renders first
  instead of flashing demo data in non-demo mode
- Only fetch live data in demo mode on console.kubestellar.io (Netlify),
  not on local dev instances

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
